reason: ADR.md v1.0 is a comprehensive, well-structured Phase 2 deliverable. All 14 ADRs have substantive Context/Decision/Consequences/Alternatives Considered bodies; the Traceability Matrix covers every SRS FR-01..FR-05 and NFR-01..NFR-06 with implementation site mapping. Decisions align with SAD.md (hub-and-spoke pattern, 8 modules, 2 source-bearing dirs, FR-01..FR-05 traceability, exit code policy 0/1/2/3/4). Template parity note explicitly documents the Alternatives Considered vs. Rationale substitution — acceptable. Two minor factual/doc drift gaps found (default threshold misquote; phantom §5.1 citation) — neither breaks the architectural contract. Approval recommended with the gaps noted for Phase 3 correction.
